final_prompt.prompt:
Create a technical step-by-step instructional diagram illustrating how to deploy hermes inside a docker container and integrate glmcodingplan.

Style/medium: needs a clean technical-documentation illustration aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a vertical multi-step layout with clearly numbered steps 1, 2, 3, 4
Subject: must include all 4 deployment steps:
  Step 1: docker 环境准备 / 拉取 hermes 镜像
  Step 2: 启动 docker 容器并配置 hermes
  Step 3: 接入 glmcodingplan（配置连接参数）
  Step 4: 验证部署 / 运行测试
Scene/backdrop: needs a dark terminal / IDE-inspired backdrop — exact background treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: needs a technical dark-theme direction with accent highlights per step — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include step labels "1" "2" "3" "4" (large, numbered badges), "hermes", "docker", "glmcodingplan" as labels on relevant diagram elements
Constraints: must preserve clear visual separation between each numbered step; each step must contain a mini diagram or code-block illustration showing the action
Avoid: must avoid decorative or abstract art styles; must avoid ambiguous step ordering
